task.title: Migrate public coordination API to session queue scoped leases
task.summary: Replace public claim vocabulary with artifact-status-first session queue coordination while preserving transitional compatibility for existing claim/lease callers.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki public coordination language/API expose artifact availability, in-use, waiting, conflict, and stale status from session queue state; sessions are holders/waiters behind artifact status, and /wiki-resume allocates safe parallel work from that state.
acceptance: Domain/session queue types model artifact statuses for tasks, paths, builds, validation refs, generated state, and publication refs with holders, waiters, heartbeat/TTL, handoff metadata, and isolation context.
Public API/tool/UI/graph/prompt language uses artifact status terminology (available, in-use, waiting, conflict, stale, holder, waiter) instead of claim/lease as primary concepts.
Legacy codewiki_claim and any lease/claim naming remains only as compatibility/internal implementation detail with deprecation/migration notes if needed.
New or renamed application tool/API surface exposes artifact-status operations: inspect status, mark/use artifact for read/write work, wait, heartbeat, release, and list holders/waiters.
Storage remains .codewiki/session/queue.json unless migration planning explicitly changes it.
Tests cover artifact status create/list/release/heartbeat/wait behavior and legacy alias compatibility.

/wiki-resume without an explicit task reads fresh CodeWiki state plus session queue artifact statuses and selects the next unblocked atomic task whose relevant artifacts are available or read-compatible.
/wiki-resume TASK-### honors an explicit non-closed task request even when an umbrella task is active, unless task policy or artifact conflict provides a real block with a clear explanation.

Resume output includes selected task, artifact statuses, conflicting artifacts and holders/waiters, temporary session usage record, and helper-safe next steps so one tab/session can start parallel work with a single /wiki-resume invocation.
codewiki_session_handoff no longer treats a killed spawned Pi subprocess as an acceptable validation/handoff path.
Tool-context new-session handoff stages a durable handoff artifact and reports the exact /wiki-session-handoff command when interactive replacement is required.
/wiki-session-handoff can execute a staged handoff via ctx.newSession and marks started/completed/cancelled/failures accurately.
Tests cover tool staging behavior, no unbounded spawn by default, command-context ctx.newSession execution, and stale/bad handoff handling.
Public schemas/skill guidance no longer claim tool context reliably spawns fresh pi processes for validation.
non_goals: Do not break existing users abruptly by deleting codewiki_claim before compatibility alias and migration notes exist.
Do not treat session queue artifact status as durable roadmap truth.
Do not use broad umbrella tasks such as TASK-077 as default implementation work when safe child/atomic tasks are available.
Do not make claim or lease primary project lexicon terms.
Do not implement a full subagent scheduler.
Do not change Pi core APIs.
Do not close or validate unrelated artifact-status scheduler work.
verification: targeted legacy claim/lease alias compatibility smoke
targeted /wiki-resume parallel allocation smoke with active umbrella focus and artifact conflict fixtures
stale-term scan for public claim/lease vocabulary with allowed compatibility/internal exceptions only

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Corrected stale public API guidance found by fresh TASK-086 handoff validation failure: api.md now says tool-context Pi new-session handoffs stage /wiki-session-handoff and only command context performs ctx.newSession.

evidence: Re-ran full check suite after api.md correction; session-handoff smoke remains passing.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: .codewiki/kb/system/api.md corrected stale handoff and coordination vocabulary.
notes: Fresh validation failed because api.md still advertised removed tool-spawn behavior; this build captures corrective documentation change before re-validation.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Re-ran full check suite after api.md correction; session-handoff smoke remains passing.
code_change_evidence: .codewiki/kb/system/api.md corrected stale handoff and coordination vocabulary.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Public schemas/skill/guidance no longer claim tool context reliably spawns fresh pi processes for validation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated .codewiki/kb/system/api.md stale line flagged by fresh validator to state tool-context Pi new-session handoffs stage durable artifacts and command-context /wiki-session-handoff performs ctx.newSession.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Artifact-status terminology remains public coordination language.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated api.md write rules from scoped leases/write leases to artifact status records and write artifact statuses.

closure_brief.user_intent: Proceed after fixing /wiki-session-handoff by resolving fresh validation failure and revalidating.
implemented_changes: Corrected api.md session handoff guidance from tool-driven fresh subprocess to staged /wiki-session-handoff plus command-context ctx.newSession.
Updated api.md coordination wording from scoped leases to artifact status records.
acceptance_evidence: Fresh validator failure issue is addressed in api.md.
remaining_risks: Requires fresh pass validation after correction.

risks: Need fresh re-validation after this corrective build.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-086 Migrate public coordination API to session queue scoped leases implementation evidence
commit.body:
Corrected stale public API guidance found by fresh TASK-086 handoff validation failure: api.md now says tool-context Pi new-session handoffs stage /wiki-session-handoff and only command context performs ctx.newSession.

Checks: node tests/smoke/session-handoff.test.mjs, npm run typecheck, npm run test:smoke, npm test, npm run check:architecture
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
